summary: The diff implements substantial portions of REQ-71, REQ-72, and REQ-73. AttackAnimation.tsx has been rewritten with element-specific projectile animations using requestAnimationFrame and canvas. Battle.tsx includes 3-phase animation, element-colored move buttons, cooldown overlays, and screen shake. NinjaBattleSprite.tsx adds charge glow support. Several specific sub-requirements need closer examination for completeness.

missing_requirements.requirement: Wind moves — a spinning crescent-blade gust rendered as a rotating SVG arc or CSS-rotated element, with swirling leaf/air particles in its wake and a slashing impact effect
missing_requirements.reason: The AttackAnimation.tsx diff is truncated and only shows fire and lightning implementations in detail. Wind crescent blade rendering is mentioned in the file summary but cannot be confirmed as fully implemented with spinning rotation, leaf/air particles in wake, and slashing impact effect.

missing_requirements.requirement: Earth moves — a jagged rock-shard projectile with dust cloud scatter particles trailing behind it and a ground-crack shockwave ring on impact
missing_requirements.reason: File summary mentions jagged rock polygon and earth cracks but the diff is truncated and full implementation details including dust cloud scatter particles trailing and ground-crack shockwave ring cannot be fully verified.

missing_requirements.requirement: Screen shake triggers at the moment of impact — heavier for player hit, lighter for opponent hit
missing_requirements.reason: index.css shows screenShakeHeavy/screenShakeLight keyframes exist. Battle.tsx diff is truncated so it cannot be confirmed that the shake is applied with correct differentiation at the exact moment of impact callback.

hallucinated_features.description: NinjaBattleSprite component with element badge emoji display added as a new file
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention creating or modifying NinjaBattleSprite.tsx or adding element badge emojis to the sprite component. The request only specifies charge glow behavior in the context of Battle.tsx and AttackAnimation.tsx.

hallucinated_features.description: MOVE_COOLDOWN_MS set to a fixed 2500ms duration for all moves
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-73 specifies a cooldown overlay that depletes over the cooldown period but does not specify a fixed 2500ms value. This specific hardcoded duration was not requested in the build spec.
